title: Optimizing Indexes for SQL Joins
scenario: You are a database administrator tasked with optimizing the query performance of a database that contains a large table with over 10 million records. The query joins this table with another table, but it is taking an excessive amount of time to execute. You need to write a SQL query to analyze the indexes on the joined tables and suggest an optimal index configuration to improve performance.
constraints: Must consider the effects of index fragmentation on query performance
Must account for the overhead of additional indexes on query execution time

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the proposed index configuration optimal for the given query?
Does the proposed index configuration improve the query execution time?
Does the proposed index configuration account for index fragmentation?
Is the proposed index configuration overly complex?
